news_signals.snippet: # Transportation awards Google major contract after ‘OneGov’ deal. news_signals.title: Google CEO Pichai tells employees to gear up for big 2025 - Reddit
news_signals.snippet: “I expect some back and forth” in 2025, Pichai said. “I think we'll be state of the art.” He acknowledged that Google has had to play catchup.
